subject: Re: Supplier invoice
body: Quick reply -- will follow up properly tomorrow.\n\n-- John

subject: Re: Charter booking
body:
Saturday the 27th works, full day, rockfish. Confirm the party of 6.

-- Jack

subject: Re: Crab pot registration
body:
Tagging renewal underway, all 900 pots done before the opener.

-- Jack

subject: Re: Quarterly review
body:
Numbers look right. Let's do the SEP-IRA talk next week.

-- Jack

subject: Pot order
body:
Order 50 more pots from Bayside before Friday. Bill it to the business.

-- Jack
